description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI of mc_rtc with Docker that checks the build-and-install script on base Docker images. The workflow should trigger on push to all branches except when specific files are changed and on all pull requests. It should use a matrix strategy to run on debian_bullseye and ubuntu_22.04, checking out the repository, cloning a superbuild, freeing up space, building within Docker, and sending a Slack notification on failure.
